name: Dr Carmen McCain
title: Lecturer in African Studies
department: School of Languages, Cultures and Linguistics
expertise_topics: This 4-day British Academy Writing Workshop and 6-months of mentorship sought to amplify the voices of academic women writing about Hausa cultural studies in Northern Nigeria by providing support in revising research in preparation for publication. Authored Books

FESPACO in a time of Nollywood: The politics of the ‘video’ film at Africa’s oldest festival

Reimagining Gender Spaces in Abbas Sadiq and Zainab Idris's video-film Albashi
and African Creative Imaginations. New York: Routledge
and Representation in Theatre and Film: Africa Ukoh
biography: Kendhammer, Brandon and McCain, Carmen (2018). Athens, OH: (Ohio University Press)
research_interests: This 4-day British Academy Writing Workshop and 6-months of mentorship sought to amplify the voices of academic women writing about Hausa cultural studies in Northern Nigeria by providing support in revising research in preparation for publication.
